flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lake Tahoe Community College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $11.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Lake Tahoe Community College fell 15% between 2009 and 2010 (24.3% → 20.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lake Tahoe Community College rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($597 → $687).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lake Tahoe Community College rose 177% between 2007 and 2010 (958 → 2.7k).
